mapper.select: SELECT s.*, p.product_name FROM sales s LEFT JOIN products p ON s.product_id = p.product_id ORDER BY s.sale_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales (product_id, quantity, unit_price, total_price, cost_price, sale_date) VALUES (#{productId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalPrice}, #{costPrice}, #{saleDate})
mapper.select: SELECT MONTH(sale_date) AS month, SUM(total_price) AS revenue, SUM(cost_price) AS cogs, SUM(total_price) - SUM(cost_price) AS gross_profit, COUNT(*) AS sale_count FROM sales WHERE YEAR(sale_date) = #{year} GROUP BY MONTH(sale_date) ORDER BY MONTH(sale_date)

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) AS revenue, COALESCE(SUM(cost_price), 0) AS cogs, COALESCE(SUM(total_price) - SUM(cost_price), 0) AS gross_profit, COUNT(*) AS sale_count FROM sales WHERE YEAR(sale_date) = #{year}
